summary: Iteration-2 backend + frontend testing of SentinelGrid (auth, audit trail, bulk counterfeit, analytics, WebSocket). 16/16 new pytest tests pass and all 21 legacy tests still pass (with one legacy stale assertion updated: /api/officers now includes admin + officers). Frontend flows validated: /login page renders with correct testids, demo cards prefill fields, admin login navigates to /admin, Landing has officer-signin link, Navbar shows 'Cmdr. A. Iyer', WebSocket connects (Streams · Live pill), /officer/bulk-counterfeit uploads 3 JPEGs and produces a results table + bulk-log button, /admin/analytics renders 6 Recharts SVGs (chart-scam-by-day, chart-verdict, chart-denom, chart-note-verdict, chart-case-status, chart-top-cities), /cases opens sheet with audit-trail section that records 'Cmdr. A. Iyer' after signed-in status change, and sign-out clears localStorage 'sg_auth' to null.
critical_code_review_comments: auth_module.py: JWT secret loaded from env (good). Uses bcrypt correctly; password_hash properly excluded from user responses.
auth_module.py `ensure_users` only inserts on missing — passwords for existing users will NOT be updated if you change DEFAULT_OFFICERS[password]. Fine for now but note idempotency limitation.
server.py `optional_user` correctly returns None on missing/invalid tokens so audits record 'Anonymous Demo' as designed.
server.py WebSocket path is /api/ws/alerts registered on `app` (not APIRouter) — works and ingress passes upgrades. WSS via preview URL verified.
server.py `counterfeit_bulk_analyze` caps at 12 files and inserts each record into `counterfeit` collection — good persistence.
server.py `analytics` groups scam_by_day using string prefix on created_at ISO — assumes UTC; edge case if seed records use local TZ, but current seed is fine.
frontend LiveAlertFeed.jsx uses `wss://` on https URL — reconnect logic solid (exponential-ish delay).
frontend AuthProvider stores raw JWT in localStorage (acceptable for demo but note XSS surface).
CasesTable.jsx audit-trail rendering handles before/after diff nicely; renders 'Anonymous Demo' when no user. Tested with both signed-in and anonymous flows.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (relaxed stale test_officers assertion — now allows >=4 since /api/officers includes admin + newly-registered TEST users)
test_credentials: Admin admin@sentinelgrid.gov.in / admin@123; Officer sharma@delhi.police.in / officer@123 (per /app/memory/test_credentials.md)
seed_data_creation: Users seeded on backend startup via ensure_users. Added a TEST_User via /api/auth/register during tests (safe, prefixed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All new endpoints work: /api/auth/{login,register,me}, /api/cases/{id}/audits, /api/counterfeit/bulk-analyze (files=<...>), /api/analytics, /api/ws/alerts (wss). WebSocket connects through the preview ingress. To retest bulk counterfeit interactively, pre-generate JPEG images with PIL on host (browser sandbox may not have PIL). Note: legacy /api/officers now returns 5 (4 officers + 1 admin) instead of 4 — legacy test was updated to len >= 4.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues. Minor: LLM verdicts on the small synthetic JPEGs came back as Suspected Fake 100% in one bulk run — expected for non-photograph currency images; behavior is correct.
